title: Indore News: India Post’s Gen-Z Makeover
description: The post office has been functioning in a single room at the UTD campus since 2012 but has now been transformed with a contemporary look both inside and outside. Postal officials said the initiative aims to strengthen youth engagement with India Post while introducing them to its evolving digital services in the age of artificial intelligence.
content:
Indore (Madhya Pradesh): In an era where Gen-Z lives online and traditional post offices rarely feature in their daily lives, India Post is trying a fresh approach to reconnect with young people.
Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya (DAVV) on Monday inaugurat... [1331 chars]

title: Cyient Forms Strategic Partnership with Prospecta for AI-Driven Data Management Solutions
description: Cyient has formed a strategic partnership with Prospecta to enhance asset-heavy industries through unified data strategies and AI-driven data management solutions. The collaboration focuses on joint solutions that leverage advanced analytics and artificial intelligence to optimize operations in industries with significant physical assets, strengthening Cyient's position in the AI and data management sector.
content: Cyient has announced a strategic partnership with Prospecta, marking a significant step toward transforming asset-heavy industries through advanced data management and artificial intelligence solutions. The collaboration aims to deliver comprehensive... [4360 chars]

title: 'Uncover what's really going on': UFO researcher in Manitoba supports AI tracking
description: WINNIPEG — Artificial intelligence is going to make it easier to spot whether a bird, a plane or an otherworldly creature is in the sky, as Canadians continue to report sightings of unidentified flying objects, says Canada's top UFO expert.

title: These tools say they can spot AI fakes. Do they really work?
description: Artificial intelligence detectors are increasingly used to check the veracity of content online. With more than 1,000 tests, several strengths and plenty of weaknesses were found.
content:
Content generated by artificial intelligence has become so lifelike that it’s often impossible to tell whether a video or an image floating through social media is real or fake.
Enter the AI detector.

title: IATA Honors AI Training Breakthroughs at Cargo Symposium
description: Pika Aero was recognized for its immersive CBTA-based dangerous goods training platform, which uses artificial intelligence to create adaptive, real-world learning scenarios.

title: The Inference | AI Threatens to Disrupt The Social Contract of Internships
description: Artificial intelligence is no longer just about breakthroughs in labs or pumping billions of dollars into data centres — it’s in our hospitals, courtrooms, classrooms, and on the battlefield. At Outlook Business, we believe that India needs a sharp, nuanced, and people-first lens on this transformation.
